case_title: GIAN FERNANDO M. BARBOSA VS. ANTHONY J. SPAVONE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBOSA, GIAN FERNANDO M. AS TO DEFENDANT SPAVONE, ANTHONY J. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CELEBRITY TILE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
